name: Pasta with Pork & Basil
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Fusilli or other fresh pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the meatball ingredients thoroughly, seasoning with grated Parmesan, chopped basil, and minced garlic, along with salt and pepper.
2. Flour your hands and shape the mixture into about 32 small balls.
3. Fry in batches in a non-stick pan for 5 minutes or more until golden brown and cooked through. Shake the pan frequently to ensure even cooking.
4. Transfer the meatballs to a casserole dish and keep them hot.
5. Slice the mushrooms thinly and sauté them well. Add the mushrooms to the meatballs.
6. Return any juices collected in the casserole and make a smooth, rich sauce with butter, flour, stock, and cream. Simmer for several minutes.
7. Season the sauce with salt, pepper, grated Parmesan, and Dijon mustard just before serving.
8. Pour the sauce over the meatballs and cover. Keep hot in a low oven until ready to serve.
9. Boil the pasta until al dente, then drain well. Add it to the casserole along with fresh herbs (about 2 tablespoons each basil and chives, plus 1 tablespoon parsley) and toss gently to mix.
10. Garnish with additional basil and serve with an undressed salad.
